label: TOMASZ × HANNAH · AT-RISK · same-day welfare call
framing: Tomasz, 27, AT-RISK with mental health barriers. Hannah Brennan calls same-day. Warm, slow, no pressure.

lines.speaker: adviser
lines.text: Tomasz, it's Hannah. I know we weren't scheduled today but I wanted to hear your voice. Have you got a minute?

lines.speaker: customer
lines.text: Yeah. Sorry, I haven't been picking up much this week.

lines.speaker: adviser
lines.text: It's alright. How are you actually doing, not the work bit, just generally?

lines.speaker: customer
lines.text: Not great if I'm honest. I'm not sleeping. The interview stuff has been spinning in my head and I keep thinking I'm going to mess it up and end up back where I was.

lines.speaker: adviser
lines.text: Thank you for telling me. That takes guts to say out loud, and none of what you just described means you're failing. It means you're carrying a lot.

lines.speaker: customer
lines.text: Feels like I'm letting everyone down though.

lines.speaker: adviser
lines.text: You are not letting anyone down. Here's what we do today. First, I'm pausing the job-match notifications for two weeks. No more new ones popping up. We're not adding pressure.

lines.speaker: adviser
lines.text: Second, there's a Maximus service called Access to Work Mental Health Support. It's free, confidential, and a specialist will talk you through the sleep and anxiety side, separately from me. I'd like to refer you today, with your permission.

lines.speaker: customer
lines.text: It's free, yeah? I haven't got money for therapy.

lines.speaker: adviser
lines.text: Completely free, run by the same team I'm in. Nine months of support if you want it, you can stop whenever. Shall I make the call this afternoon?

lines.speaker: customer
lines.text: Yeah. Yeah, do it. Thanks Hannah.

lines.speaker: adviser
lines.text: Last thing. I'm coming off the auto-plan and writing you a smaller one. Three things this week, not ten. We slow it down, we keep the door open, and we keep going. Alright?

lines.speaker: adviser
lines.text: Always. I'll text you when the referral is in. Get some food and try to sleep tonight, Tomasz. We've got this.
